headline: The first Story-Rich showcase was packed with narrative-driven games
summary: Fellow Traveller hosted its Story-Rich Showcase. Over 20 narrative-driven indie games were featured. Many notable announcements were made during the event.

headline: GOG apologizes for emailing people Nazi symbols
summary: GOG sent a newsletter containing Nazi SS symbols. The company issued an apology, citing a 'series of mistakes'. Miscommunication and understaffing were blamed for the error.

headline: The cutest games from the Wholesome Direct 2026 showcase
summary: The Wholesome Direct 2026 presented over 50 games. It offered a chill, 'wholesome' change of pace at Summer Game Fest. Highlights of the cutest titles were showcased.

headline: Summer Game Fest 2026: All the news from gaming’s busiest week
summary: June marked the start of Summer Game Fest 2026. Major events were held by PlayStation and Xbox. A new look at Wolverine was among many key announcements.

headline: IGN Live 2026: Everything Announced
summary: IGN Live 2026 is underway, celebrating gaming and entertainment. The event includes a watch party for the Xbox Games Showcase. New titles like Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced were highlighted.

headline: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 DMZ First Details Tease a Feedback-Driven Extraction Experience
summary: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will feature a new DMZ mode. It promises a deeper, more cohesive combat experience. The design is influenced by player feedback.

headline: Matt Ryan on Revisiting Edward Kenway for Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced
summary: Matt Ryan discussed Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced at IGN Live. The actor, known as Edward Kenway, talked about the remake. He emphasized the timeless appeal of pirates and assassins.

headline: KASSO GAIDEN: Escape from the Skaterverse Is a Skateboarding Mobile Game Inspired By a Japanese Game Show
summary: KASSO GAIDEN is a new skateboarding mobile game. It takes inspiration from a Japanese game show format. The game promises an exciting 'Escape from the Skaterverse' experience.

headline: West Ham joint chairman David Sullivan steps down after 'serious' historical allegations
summary: David Sullivan has resigned as West Ham's joint chairman. His departure follows awareness of 'serious historic allegations'. He stepped down from his position with immediate effect.

headline: The Nowak murder has lit a match under British politics. This is how we got here
summary: The murder of Henry Nowak has ignited a debate in British politics. The police response to the case triggered heated discussions. The incident has intensified political scrutiny.

headline: King's nephew Peter Phillips weds NHS nurse with William and Kate among guests
summary: King Charles' nephew Peter Phillips married NHS nurse Harriet Sperling. The private ceremony was attended by Prince William and Kate. The couple exchanged vows on Saturday.

headline: Teenager Andreeva beats Chwalinska at French Open for first Grand Slam title
summary: Teenager Mirra Andreeva clinched her first Grand Slam title. She defeated Polish qualifier Maja Chwalinska at the French Open. Andreeva's victory fulfills her immense potential.
